title: Lemon vs Lime: The Payout
concept: Two fruits argue about who is more sour until a coin settles it the Coinplay way.
setting: a glossy kitchen counter at night, neon rim light, shallow depth of field

cast.name: Lemon
cast.design: an angry cartoon lemon with thick black outlines, tiny arms, furrowed brow, glossy yellow skin

cast.name: Lime
cast.design: a smug cartoon lime with half-closed eyes, thick outlines, glossy green skin

shots.visual: lemon and lime nose to nose on the counter, sparks between them
shots.motion: fast push-in, both characters shaking with anger

dialogue.speaker: lemon
dialogue.line: I am the sourest one here!

shots.visual: wide shot, both fruits puffing up, a gold coin spinning in the air above them
shots.motion: slow motion coin spin, camera tilts up

shots.visual: the Coinplay fox mascot lands between them holding the glowing coin
shots.motion: mascot struts in, confident pose, fruits lean back

dialogue.speaker: coinplay_host
dialogue.line: Stop arguing. On Coinplay everybody cashes out.

shots.visual: close up of the fox winking at camera, Coinplay logo glow behind

dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.line: Coinplay dot com. Play. Win. Repeat.
